title: support Buildahfile [good_first_pr]
body: Start using Buildahfile rather than Dockerfile when executing `buildah bud`. Adding `build-using-buildahfile` is just consequent...

comments.body: What exactly is a buildahfile?  Not sure we want to confuse the market. Dockerfile is a standard syntax.  The only other syntax I want to use for building container images is the "bash shell" format.

ping @goern can you address @rhatdan question, please?
😃
I think we can close this issue.
